title: Eliminacion de Layer4 y Scores Heuristicos
objective: Eliminar Layer4_PrioritizationEngine, composite_score, urgency, WEIGHTS heuristicos y respuestas API basadas en ranking/puntaje.
completed: FASE_A: Dependencias restantes ubicadas con rg sobre composite_score, urgency, prioritizeRisks, WEIGHTS, LEVEL_TO_NUM y MAX_DELTAS
FASE_B: Pipeline v2 cambiado de Layer2 -> Layer3 -> Layer4 -> Layer5 -> Layer6 a Layer2 -> interpretacion contextual -> narrativa
FASE_C: Narrativa ajustada para describir senales, tendencias, evidencia e incertidumbre sin priorizar, rankear ni puntuar
FASE_D: API v2 elimina risks priorizados y agrega confidence, evidence, scenario, provenance y uncertainty
FASE_D: Endpoint /api/risk-model y wrappers activos HxExI eliminados para evitar exposicion de score heuristicos
FASE_E: frontend ClimateRiskLookup conserva storytelling, senales, trazabilidad, adaptaciones y escenarios SSP sin lenguaje de prioridad
validation_commands: rg active audit for removed terms
validation_notes: npm test required escalated execution because sandbox blocked Node test runner child process spawning with EPERM.
Active audit excludes project-memory historical notes and deprecated folders when checking removed runtime terms.
tsconfig.typecheck.json now excludes deprecated folders so deleted active wrappers are not required by archived UI/components.
known_remaining_scope: Deprecated folders still contain archived heuristic artifacts except the removed Layer4 file; they are excluded from active validation.
Historical project-memory files still mention removed terms as sprint audit history.
